name: KAANAPALI LAND LLC
business: Kaanapali Land, LLC operates in two primary business segments: Property and Agriculture. The property segment involves land development and sales, including residential lots and commercial parcels. The agriculture segment primarily cultivates, mills, and sells coffee under the brand Mauigrown Coffee, as well as bananas and citrus.
sellsTo: interisland Hawaii roasters with retail coffee shops
mainland and international roasters, dealers, and traders
customers on Maui for bananas and citrus

exposures.sentence: Agricultural operations consist primarily of cultivation, milling and sale of coffee.

The Company is continuing with its planning for the development of Puukolii Village, a 241-acre residential development site ... planned for 940 units including a mix of affordable and market priced homes, both single and multi-family, mixed use commercial, parks, school, and community facilities.

The Company sells milled green coffee under the brand name Mauigrown Coffee mainly to interisland Hawaii customers, generally roasters who have retail coffee shops, and also sell to grocery stores and online.

catalysts.event: Sale of Pioneer Mill Site closed
catalysts.sentence: The sale of the property closed on March 10, 2026 and at closing PMC received $19.9 million in cash.

catalysts.event: Arbitration with Newport Hospital Corporation rescheduled
catalysts.sentence: The arbitration proceedings have been rescheduled for July 13, 2026, if the parties are unable to agree to an alternative to arbitration.

catalysts.event: Coffee sales resumed after Lahaina wildfire
Construction of new coffee mill anticipated to start
catalysts.sentence: The Company has received its permits from the County of Maui related to the construction of the coffee mill and anticipates construction to start in June 2026.
